channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Iran to allow UN nuclear inspectors back in, Vance says
item.description: Iran agreed to invite International Atomic Energy Agency inspectors into the country, Vice President JD Vance announced Monday after the first round o...

item.title: Democrats face increasing challenges in Maine
item.description: House Democrats' campaign arm and main super PAC are not committing to full efforts to retain Maine's only swing district.

item.title: Bobby Pulido performed at school benefit with registered sex offender
item.description: Democratic congressional candidate and musician Bobby Pulido shared the stage with a registered sex offender at a Texas middle school benefit concert.

item.title: Axios-Ipsos poll: Health costs influence midterm voting
item.description: Data: Axios-Ipsos; Note: Margin of error is +/-2.9 percentage points; Chart: Caitlin Owens/Axios Most Americans say they are more likely to vote based on health care affordability.
